text:
{
  "isSuspicious": true,
  "deviation": "The process 'payload.exe', which is not a standard Windows binary, was executed from the Downloads folder and performed extensive modifications to system certificate stores (SystemCertificates, EnterpriseCertificates, Disallowed) and security-related registry keys (TenantRestrictions, SCHANNEL). This behavior is highly indicative of malicious activity, such as attempting to install rogue certificates, bypass security policies, or establish persistence.",
  "indicators": [
    "unusual process name",
    "execution from Downloads folder",
    "registry modification of certificate stores",
    "registry modification of security policies",
    "wininet.dll load",
    "ws2_32.dll load",
    "cryptography related DLLs loaded"
  ]
}
